intro: Topology summarizes how concept relationships persist, split, or disappear over time. In this project, H1 persistence tracks durable loops that reflect recurring conceptual bridges.

steps.title: Step 1: Build yearly concept simplices
steps.description: For each year, co-occurring HCI concepts are converted into simplices representing local structure.

steps.title: Step 2: Track loop persistence
steps.description: We compute persistent homology and quantify which H1 loops remain across adjacent years.

steps.title: Step 3: Interpret boundary patterns
steps.description: Representative boundary cases are read with domain context to explain integration and non-integration.

captures: Durability of multi-concept bridges across years.
When separate subdomains become structurally connected.
Whether local closures align with sustained conceptual loops.
misses: Causal impact of a concept on design outcomes.
Normative quality or ethical value of a research direction.
Fine-grained meaning shifts that require close reading of papers.
